overview.description: The Opportunistic Trader ETF (WZRD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that combines tactical US large-cap equity investing with active option strategies. The heavy use of derivative instruments allows this ETF to reach into other asset classes WZRD was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Opportunistic.
